sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ أَحْسَنَ النَّاسِ خُلُقًا، وَقَدْ ضَرَبَ أَرْوَعَ الْأَمْثِلَةِ فِي الصَّبْرِ وَالْحِلْمِ وَالتَّوَاضُعِ مَعَ الصَّغِيرِ وَالْكَبِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, bio je najljepšeg morala, i pružio je najdivnije primjere strpljenja, blagosti i poniznosti prema malima i velikima.
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet ﷺ was the best of people in character, and he set the most wonderful examples of patience, forbearance, and humility with both the young and the old.

sentences.arabic: يَرْوِي أَنَسُ بْنُ مَالِكٍ رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُ، وَهُوَ الَّذِي خَدَمَ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ عَشْرَ سِنِينَ، قَائِلًا: «خَدَمْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ عَشْرَ سِنِينَ، فَوَاللهِ مَا قَالَ لِي أُفٍّ قَطُّ، وَلَا قَالَ لِي لِشَيْءٍ: لِمَ صَنَعْتَ كَذَا؟
sentences.translation: Enes ibn Malik, radijallahu anhu, koji je služio Vjerovjesnika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, deset godina, prenosi govoreći: 'Služio sam Allahovog Poslanika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, deset godina, i tako mi Allaha, nikada mi nije rekao ni 'uh', niti mi je za nešto što sam uradio rekao: Zašto si to uradio?, niti za nešto što nisam uradio: Zašto to nisi uradio?' [Muslim, Knjiga o odlikama, br. 2309].
sentences.translationEn: Anas ibn Malik, may Allah be pleased with him, who served the Prophet ﷺ for ten years, narrates saying: 'I served the Messenger of Allah ﷺ for ten years, and by Allah, he never said "Uff" to me, nor did he ever say of anything I did: "Why did you do that?" nor of anything I did not do: "Why did you not do that?"' [Reported by Muslim in the Book of Virtues, No. 2309].

sentences.arabic: وَلَا لِشَيْءٍ لَمْ أَصْنَعْهُ: أَلَا صَنَعْتَ كَذَا؟» [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الْفَضَائِلِ، رَقْم ٢٣٠٩].
sentences.translation: Šejh Ibn Usejmin, Allah mu se smilovao, ukazuje na to da ovaj hadis ukazuje na savršenstvo njegove milosti i blagosti prema ashabima i slugama.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh Ibn Uthaymeen, may Allah have mercy on him, points out that this hadith indicates the perfection of his ﷺ mercy and kindness toward his companions and servants.

sentences.arabic: وَيُشِيرُ الشَّيْخُ ابْنُ عُثَيْمِينَ رَحِمَهُ اللهُ إِلَى أَنَّ هَذَا الْحَدِيثَ يَدُلُّ عَلَى كَمَالِ رَحْمَتِهِ ﷺ وَرِفْقِهِ بِأَصْحَابِهِ وَخَدَمِهِ.
sentences.translation: Slijeđenje Poslanikove sire nije samo puka tvrdnja o ljubavi, već praktična primjena njegovog morala u našem svakodnevnom životu.
sentences.translationEn: Following the Prophetic biography is not merely a claim of love, but a practical application of his ﷺ character in our daily lives.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاقْتِدَاءَ بِالسِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ ادِّعَاءٍ بِالْمَحَبَّةِ، بَلْ هُوَ تَطْبِيقٌ عَمَلِيٌّ لِأَخْلَاقِهِ ﷺ فِي حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman treba biti velikodušan u kupovini i prodaji, blag prema svojim ukućanima i strpljiv na uznemiravanja ljudi tražeći Allahovo zadovoljstvo.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim should be easy-going in buying and selling, kind to his family, and patient with people's harm seeking the pleasure of Allah.

sentences.arabic: فَيَنْبَغِي لِلْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يَكُونَ سَمْحًا فِي بَيْعِهِ وَشِرَائِهِ، رَفِيقًا بِأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ، وَصَبُورًا عَلَى أَذَى النَّاسِ ابْتِغَاءَ مَرْضَاةِ اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Kilaćenje ovim pohvalnim osobinama približava roba mjestu do Poslanika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, na Sudnjem danu i čini ga voljenim na nebu i na zemlji, jer je lijep moral najteža stvar koja će se staviti na vagu vjernika.
sentences.translationEn: Adorning oneself with these praiseworthy qualities brings the servant closer in assembly to the Prophet ﷺ on the Day of Resurrection and makes him beloved in the heavens and the earth, for good character is the heaviest thing placed in the believer's scale.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّحَلِّيَ بِهَذِهِ الصِّفَاتِ الْحَمِيدَةِ يُقَرِّبُ الْعَبْدَ مِنَ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ مَجْلِسًا يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ، وَيَجْعَلُهُ مَحْبُوبًا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَالْأَرْضِ، فَالْخُلُقُ الْحَسَنُ هُوَ أَثْقَلُ مَا يُوضَعُ فِي مِيزَانِ الْمُؤْمِنِ.
sentences.translation: Kilaćenje ovim pohvalnim osobinama približava roba mjestu do Poslanika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, na Sudnjem danu i čini ga voljenim na nebu i na zemlji, jer je lijep moral najteža stvar koja će se staviti na vagu vjernika.
sentences.translationEn: Adorning oneself with these praiseworthy qualities brings the servant closer in assembly to the Prophet ﷺ on the Day of Resurrection and makes him beloved in the heavens and the earth, for good character is the heaviest thing placed in the believer's scale.
